# v0.9.1 upgrade fixture

This instance snapshot was generated by the tagged `v0.9.1` application code,
then exported as JSON files and SQLite SQL dumps so it remains reviewable in Git.
All hosts, credentials, users, identifiers, and timestamps are synthetic.

The compatibility test reconstructs the instance, starts the current app, and
verifies authentication, saved profiles, encrypted automation definitions,
activity history, audit history, and the migration ledger survive unchanged.

The final v0.8.0 lineage commit (`2058025`), tag `v0.9.0`, and tag `v0.9.1`
were also initialized with their own application code and compared before this
fixture was selected. Their activity, audit, and automation SQLite schemas have
identical schema fingerprints, so the newest snapshot represents that entire
upgrade range while retaining v0.9.1's fullest saved-state surface.
